nodes.name: Recipe Request Receiver
nodes.notes: Accepts POST requests from the Angular frontend. Expects JSON with ingredients and preferences. CORS is open to allow localhost and production origins.

nodes.name: Validate & Sanitize Input
nodes.notes: Validates that required fields (ingredients, preferences) are present and sanitizes string inputs to prevent injection. Returns 400 if validation fails.

nodes.name: Check IP Quota
nodes.notes: Reads the current usage counter for the hashed client IP from Firebase Realtime Database. The date-keyed path ensures automatic daily reset.

nodes.name: Evaluate Quota
nodes.notes: Parses the Firebase response and computes whether the IP limit (3/day) and system-wide limit (12/day) have been reached. Attaches quota status to the item.

nodes.name: Quota Gate
nodes.notes: Routes requests: allowed requests proceed to Claude generation; exceeded requests are routed to the Quota Exceeded Response node.

nodes.name: Generate 3 Recipes (Claude)
nodes.notes: Calls the Anthropic Claude API with a structured prompt asking for exactly 3 recipe suggestions in JSON format. On error, routes to Handle Generation Error.

nodes.name: Parse Claude Response
nodes.notes: Extracts and validates the JSON recipe array from Claude's text response. If parsing fails or content is refused, routes to Handle Generation Error.

nodes.name: Update IP Quota
nodes.notes: Increments the IP-specific and system-wide counters in Firebase Realtime Database after a successful generation to enforce daily limits.

nodes.name: Return Recipes to Angular
nodes.notes: Sends the final JSON response with the 3 recipes back to the waiting Angular frontend via the webhook response channel.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: 'quota_exceeded', message: 'Daily limit reached. Please try again tomorrow.', ipCount: $json.ipCount, systemCount: $json.systemCount }) }}

nodes.name: Quota Exceeded Response
nodes.notes: Returns HTTP 200 with { success: false, error: "quota_exceeded" } so Angular can display the daily-limit error message.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const msg = String($json.error?.message ?? ''); const isRefused = msg.startsWith('CONTENT_REFUSED:'); return JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: isRefused ? 'content_refused' : 'generation_failed', message: isRefused ? msg.replace('CONTENT_REFUSED: ', '') : 'Recipe generation failed. Please try again.' }); })() }}

nodes.name: Handle Generation Error
nodes.notes: Returns HTTP 200 with { success: false, error: "generation_failed" } or content_refused when Claude fails or rejects the ingredient.

nodes.name: Workflow Error Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires whenever this workflow terminates with an uncaught error. Connect to the Send Error Email node so the operator is notified immediately.

parameters.subject: ⚠️ Code-à-Cuisine Workflow Error

nodes.name: Send Error Email
nodes.notes: Sends an email alert to the operator when the workflow fails. Configure SMTP credentials in n8n Credentials before activating. Uses the built-in error context from the Error Trigger.
